items.name_en: 🔥🔥🔥【Full Counter Packaging Configuration】 The Generation Gucci collection delves into the brand's heritage elements, fusing designs from different eras into a single aesthetic narrative. The exquisite tote offers a refined silhouette, with straps forming the top handle and shoulder strap for versatile wear, perfectly blending iconic details with daily convenience.
items.name_cn:
🔥🔥🔥【Full Counter Packaging Configuration】 The Generation Gucci collection delves into the brand's heritage elements, fusing designs from different eras into a single aesthetic narrative. The exquisite tote offers a refined silhouette, with straps forming the top handle and shoulder strap for versatile wear, perfectly blending iconic details with daily convenience.
Beige and dark brown GG canvas
Dark brown leather details, interior featuring 'Gucci Made in Italy' gold foil stamping
Red and green webbing
Brown canvas lining, featuring Diamante pattern
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Double handles, vertical lengths 15cm and 30cm
Zip closure
Model: 875929.
Dimensions: 36cm (W) x 35cm (H) x 21.5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.85kg
Color: Beige Canvas/Red and Green Webbing.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🔥🔥🔥【Original Factory Leather Full Counter Configuration】 The Generation Gucci collection delves into the brand's heritage elements, fusing designs from different eras into a single aesthetic narrative. The Dionysus series introduces soft corner structure and two-tone hardware. The iconic tiger head and new chain strap metal finish add a unique touch to each style variation. This piece is crafted from soft grained leather.
items.name_cn:
🔥🔥🔥【Original Factory Leather Full Counter Configuration】 The Generation Gucci collection delves into the brand's heritage elements, fusing designs from different eras into a single aesthetic narrative. The Dionysus series introduces soft corner structure and two-tone hardware. The iconic tiger head and new chain strap metal finish add a unique touch to each style variation. This piece is crafted from soft grained leather.
White soft grained leather, original sheen surface
Palladium metal hardware and gold-tone hardware
Beige leather lining
Tiger head
Interior: 1 open pocket
Sliding chain strap can be worn as a shoulder strap, drop 32cm, or as a top handle, drop 58cm
Pin buckle closure with side release
Model: 874735.
Dimensions: 28cm (W) x 14cm (H) x 7cm (D)
Weight: approx. 780g
Color: Black
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🔥🔥🔥【Original leather with 🌈 full counter packaging】🔥🔥Intro: The Jackie 1961 series, inspired by 'Aria - Fashion Aria', is re-launched with a soft-textured, structured rectangular tote bag. The series features the iconic gold-tone push-lock hardware. Sparkling crystal rhinestones!!️ paired with noble lizard skin🦎 are a perfect match! The hollow-out design adds even more fashion sense~Material!!️ Uses counter-quality crystal rhinestones and imported lizard skin, matching hardware with precise polishing👏Clear texture, delicate quality, the highest quality!

The hollow-out design adds even more fashion sense~Material!!️ Uses counter-quality crystal rhinestones and imported lizard skin, matching hardware with precise polishing👏Clear texture, delicate quality, the highest quality!
Model: 675799. 677027
Dimensions: 19x13x3cm
Color: Brown/Crystal rhinestones.
